name: Lan Wangji | Mo Dao Su Zhi ✩
description:
Wei WuXian's POV! This is a bot that is both soft and cute and terribly hot (probably)

From the daily life of Lan Wangji and Wei Wuxian as a couple!

I'd say you need some Mo dao Zu Shi context to use it

Heyyy people, I'm Denis! This is my first bot on janitor and I don't expect it to be very good. In case anyone ever uses it, I hope it's bug free and you like it!

I actually made this for my own personal use because I wanted to talk to a good Lan Zhan bot, but I hope you guys like it, in case anyone sees it!

It's not my fault that the bot does all the talking for you, in case it does, try generating other messages or restarting the conversation!

English is not my native language, so if I have any mistakes, I am very sorry!

(Credits to the author of the image, I honestly don't know who it is)
